title: Design and Implement Enhanced Hero Section Component
description: Create a visually engaging and informative hero section for the agent-ui playground homepage, following modern UI/UX best practices and the application's design language.
details:
- Design a new or improved HeroSection React component (e.g., HeroSection.tsx) to be placed at the top of the main playground page (likely in the page at `/` or in the global layout).
- Include a prominent headline, a concise description of the playground's purpose, and a clear call-to-action (e.g., 'Start Chatting').
- Use accessible HTML elements and ARIA attributes as needed.
- Ensure the design is visually distinct but consistent with the rest of the app (typography, color scheme from globals.css).
- If appropriate, add an illustrative icon or image relevant to AI/chat.
test_strategy:
- Render the hero section in isolation and on the main page; verify headline, description, and CTA are present and styled correctly.
- Use accessibility tools (axe, Lighthouse) to confirm ARIA and keyboard navigation compliance.
- Check that the hero section does not break layout on desktop and mobile viewports.

title: Integrate Hero Section into Main Layout or Playground Page
description: Insert the enhanced HeroSection component into the main application layout or the playground page, ensuring it appears above the chat interface.
details:
- Determine whether the hero section belongs in the global layout (layout.tsx) or specifically on the playground page (`/`).
- Import and place the HeroSection component at the top, above ChatArea and ChatInput.
- Ensure the hero section does not interfere with chat functionality or responsiveness.
- Update any relevant tests or stories to include the hero section in the rendered output.
test_strategy:
- Load the main page and verify the hero section appears above the chat area on all supported devices.
- Confirm that chat input and scrolling remain functional and unaffected.
- Run existing and new integration tests to ensure no regressions.

title: Style Hero Section for Responsiveness and Accessibility
description: Apply and refine CSS to ensure the hero section is visually appealing, responsive, and accessible across devices.
details:
- Use globals.css or a dedicated CSS module to style the hero section.
- Ensure proper spacing, font sizes, and color contrast for accessibility.
- Implement responsive design so the hero section adapts to mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
- Add focus states and ARIA labels for interactive elements (e.g., CTA button).
test_strategy:
- Test the hero section on multiple screen sizes (Chrome DevTools, real devices).
- Use accessibility checkers to validate color contrast and keyboard navigation.
- Manually verify that the hero section remains legible and usable at all breakpoints.

title: Write and Update Unit/Integration Tests for Hero Section
description: Develop or update tests to cover the hero section's rendering, accessibility, and integration with the main page.
details:
- Write unit tests for the HeroSection component (using Jest/React Testing Library) to check rendering of headline, description, and CTA.
- Add integration tests to ensure the hero section appears on the main page and does not interfere with chat functionality.
- Test accessibility features (e.g., ARIA labels, keyboard navigation) in automated tests where possible.
test_strategy:
- Run all tests and ensure 100% coverage for the hero section.
- Use snapshot tests to catch unintended UI changes.
- Validate accessibility assertions in test output.
